_comment: Blackbaud SKY API — Financial Edge NXT (GL / finance) + Raiser's Edge NXT (donations). Copy to blackbaud.local.json (gitignored) and fill from your Blackbaud developer account / the Azure app's stored secrets. Auth = OAuth2 authorization_code; every call sends Authorization: Bearer <token> + Bb-Api-Subscription-Key: <key>. NOTE: SKY refresh tokens ROTATE on each use (single-use, ~60-day life) — the nightly job must persist the new one each run.
redirect_uri: <the redirect URI registered on the SKY app>
access_token: <optional: paste a token to verify immediately without the refresh call>
